name: tsoa-next-playground
description: A multi-server tsoa-next playground with generated specs, routes, and Playwright API coverage.

scripts.generate:clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('src/server', { force: true, recursive: true }); fs.rmSync('src/specs', { force: true, recursive: true });"
scripts.generate: npm run generate:clean && npm run generate:express && npm run generate:koa && npm run generate:hapi
scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { force: true, recursive: true })" && npm run generate && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test:api: npm run generate && playwright test -c playwrightConfig.ts

author: Vanna DiCatania <vanna@dicatania.me> https://dicatania.me
